name: 8 Minute Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 (8 oz.) container Birds Eye Cucumber Salad Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the sugar, beating until combined.
3. Stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
4. Gently fold in the whipped topping, mixing well to combine.
5. Spoon the batter into a prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Chill for at least 4 hours, or until set.
7. Garnish with fresh strawberries if desired before serving.
